description: Coupling Score item definitions (Requirement 5.1-5.2). Loaded by discover-coupling.md. Computed unconditionally during Discover, same as preflight-checks.json.

items.title: ISR / on-demand revalidation
items.detection: revalidateTag / revalidatePath / route-segment revalidate calls in source configs and build output
items.weight_rationale: Portable via OpenNext but requires the tag cache and revalidation queue to be provisioned as a unit, not independently - see Pre-Flight Check I1.

items.title: Edge middleware
items.weight_rationale: Behavioral divergence on every AWS outcome - see Pre-Flight Check M1 (flagship).

items.title: Edge runtime routes
items.detection: runtime: 'edge' declarations in route segment configs
items.weight_rationale: Edge runtime routes hit Lambda@Edge-style constraints (smaller runtime, limited Node API surface) when migrated.

items.title: Image optimization
items.detection: next/image usage plus next.config.js image config
items.weight_rationale: Portable - OpenNext ships its own sharp-based image optimization; see Pre-Flight Check B3 for the duplicate-dependency conflict.

items.title: Streaming SSR
items.detection: route handler analysis for streaming response patterns
items.weight_rationale: A known Lambda workaround exists for empty-body streams (see Pre-Flight Check S1); next start (Outcome B) streams natively.

items.title: Server Actions / version skew exposure
items.detection: Next.js framework version plus Server Actions usage in source
items.weight_rationale: Vercel handles skew protection (mismatched client/server deploy versions) automatically; the AWS path must address this explicitly regardless of outcome.

items.title: Preview deployments
items.detection: Clarify Q4 (team workflow) - not detectable from code alone
items.weight_rationale: No AWS equivalent exists; drives the Outcome C (Hybrid) precedence rule. The single heaviest 'what you lose' item in every report.

items.title: Vercel KV / Postgres / Blob / Edge Config / Cron
items.weight_rationale: Clean peripheral mappings exist for all of these - see knowledge/peripheral-mappings.json.

items.title: Vercel-injected headers (geo, IP)
items.detection: grep for x-vercel-ip-* and similar headers in middleware/server code
items.weight_rationale: Needs a CloudFront-headers rewrite mapping - see Pre-Flight Check M2.
